tasks.name: Create action configuration and types
tasks.purpose: Define the structure and priority order of quick action CTAs with their routing, icons, and conditions

dependencies: lucide-react icons (PlayCircle, CheckSquare, ListTodo, ClipboardList, Plus)
constraints: Priority order must be: Continue Learning > Complete Quiz > View Tasks > Take Survey > Create Presentation
Must include condition key matching userState boolean flags
All routes must be valid Next.js paths

tasks.input_state: UserState type exists from F2 (activity-data-aggregation) with boolean flags: hasIncompleteLessons, hasIncompleteQuizzes, hasUncompletedTasks, hasIncompleteSurvey
tasks.output_state: QuickAction type interface with label, icon, href, condition keys; QUICK_ACTIONS array with 5 prioritized action configurations
tasks.acceptance_criterion: QuickAction type is defined with required fields and QUICK_ACTIONS array contains exactly 5 actions in priority order with correct icons and routes

tasks.name: Create action filtering utility
tasks.purpose: Filter the QUICK_ACTIONS array based on UserState to show only relevant CTAs for the current user

constraints: Must return at least 1 action (fallback to Create Presentation if no conditions match)
Maintain priority order from QUICK_ACTIONS array

tasks.input_state: QUICK_ACTIONS array exists with condition keys; UserState type with boolean flags exists
tasks.output_state: filterQuickActions(userState: UserState) function returns QuickAction[] with 1-4 applicable actions
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function filters actions based on userState conditions and always returns at least 'Create Presentation' action as fallback

tasks.name: Create QuickActionsPanel component
tasks.purpose: Render filtered quick actions as a dashboard card with buttons arranged in responsive grid

constraints: Responsive grid: 2x2 on desktop (grid-cols-2), 1x4 on mobile (grid-cols-1)
Button should use asChild pattern with Link for navigation
Must display at least 1 CTA at all times
Buttons sized lg with gap-4 between them
Touch targets minimum 48px per UX research

tasks.input_state: filterQuickActions function exists; QuickAction type with label, icon, href fields; UserState prop passed from parent
tasks.output_state: QuickActionsPanel component renders Card with filtered action buttons in responsive grid layout
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders 1-4 contextual CTA buttons based on userState, displays correct icons and labels, and navigates to correct routes when clicked
tasks.verification_command: agent-browser open http://localhost:3000/home && agent-browser wait 3000 && agent-browser is visible 'Quick Actions' && agent-browser find role link && agent-browser screenshot /tmp/quick-actions-panel.png

tasks.name: Wire QuickActionsPanel to dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Integrate QuickActionsPanel into the dashboard grid layout with userState data from loadDashboardData

constraints: Must await params before using them (Next.js 15 pattern)
Must pass userState prop from loader data to QuickActionsPanel
Add to dashboard grid in appropriate position (Row 2, Column 2 per spec mockup)

tasks.input_state: QuickActionsPanel component exists; loadDashboardData returns userState; dashboard page has PageBody placeholder
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page renders QuickActionsPanel with userState data from server loader in correct grid position
tasks.acceptance_criterion: QuickActionsPanel appears in dashboard grid and displays contextual actions based on real user data
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm dev & sleep 5 && curl -s http://localhost:3000/home | grep -q 'Quick Actions' && pkill -f 'next-server'
